## What you want to do

<!-- One sentence. The thing the current Trinity can't do but should. -->

## Why this matters

<!-- The friction it removes, the use case it unlocks, the bug it sidesteps. -->

## Where this would fit

<!-- If you've already poked at the code, name the file/module. Optional. -->

- [ ] New MCP tool
- [ ] New CLI subcommand
- [ ] Launchpad UI affordance
- [ ] Chrome extension capture surface
- [ ] Council mechanic (chairman, member, chain mode)
- [ ] Cortex / picks / routing layer
- [ ] Lens pipeline / `lens-build`
- [ ] Provider adapter (Cursor / Windsurf / Aider / Cline / OpenCode / …)
- [ ] Something else
